{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20767_1
|class_id=20767
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20767_2
|fame=12
|art=21
|fth=26
|civ=13
|tech=18
|ss1=Snail RUSH +10<br>Per God of Faith Descent, Snail ATK +1<br>God of Faith Descended: 40/40
|ss2=Snail RUSH +20<br>Per God of Faith Descent, Snail ATK +2<br>God of Faith Descended: 40/40
|ss3=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per God of Faith Descent, Snail ATK +3<br>God of Faith Descended: 40/40
|ss4=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per God of Faith Descent, Snail ATK +3<br>God of Faith Descended: 40/40
|ss7=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per God of Faith Descent, Snail ATK +3<br>God of Faith Descended: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
